sentences.arabic: تُسَاعِدُ الْمَجْمُوعَاتُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ فِي تَبَادُلِ الْخِبْرَاتِ بَيْنَ الْأَعْضَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalne grupe pomažu u razmjeni iskustava među članovima.
sentences.translationEn: Digital groups help in exchanging experiences among members.

sentences.arabic: يَنْضَمُّ الطُّلَّابُ إِلَى مَجْمُوعَاتٍ لِدِرَاسَةِ اللُّغَةِ الْعَرَبِيَّةِ مَعًا.
sentences.translation: Studenti se pridružuju grupama kako bi zajedno učili arapski jezik.
sentences.translationEn: Students join groups to study the Arabic language together.

sentences.arabic: يُمْكِنُكَ طَرْحُ الْأَسْئِلَةِ وَالْحُصُولُ عَلَى إِجَابَاتٍ سَرِيعَةٍ مِنَ الْخُبَرَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Možeš postavljati pitanja i dobivati brze odgovore od stručnjaka.
sentences.translationEn: You can ask questions and get quick answers from experts.

sentences.arabic: التَّعَاوُنُ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِت يُسَهِّلُ عَمَلِيَّةَ التَّعَلُّمِ الذَّاتِيِّ كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Saradnja putem interneta uveliko olakšava proces samostalnog učenja.
sentences.translationEn: Online cooperation greatly facilitates the process of self-learning.
